overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a cowboy character exploring a bustling wooden dock area in Saint Denis. The character moves through loading areas with crates and wagons, passes workers and NPCs, and traverses covered walkways and open plazas with period-appropriate wooden architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden loading dock with sandbags and cargo crates

events.description: character transitions from walking to running/jogging pace

agents.ego_description: walking then jogging through the dock area, navigating around wooden crates and sandbag barriers

notable_agents.action: worker sweeping the wooden dock with a broom

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the main walking surface
stacks of canvas sandbags lining the dock edge
square wooden cargo boxes scattered on the dock
cylindrical metal barrels near the dock edge
large wooden industrial buildings with sloped roofs
tall wooden utility poles with crossbars

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden loading dock with sandbags and cargo crates scattered about. The character begins walking then transitions to a jog, moving past a worker sweeping the deck. Wooden warehouses and telegraph poles frame the background as the character approaches an area with parked horse-drawn wagons.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock area with parked wagons and waterfront access

agents.ego_description: running past horse-drawn wagons then slowing to walk along the waterfront edge

notable_agents.action: worker in red shirt standing beside a wagon with red wheels

entered.detail: wooden cargo wagons with large spoked wheels parked on the dock
simple wooden fence along the water's edge
calm waterway with boats docked along the far side

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a more open section of the dock where horse-drawn wagons are parked. The waterfront becomes visible to the right, bordered by a simple wooden railing. Workers and dockhands move about the area, including one in a red shirt near a wagon. The wooden warehouses recede to the left as the character progresses toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered dock walkway with dark wooden roof structure

events.description: entering the shadow of the covered dock structure, significant darkening of scene

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront railing then entering a dark covered walkway

entered.detail: dark wooden roofed structure covering the dock walkway
thick vertical timber posts supporting the roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the water's edge, passing dock workers, then enters a covered wooden structure that casts deep shadows across the dock. The lighting shifts dramatically as the character moves under the dark wooden roof supported by heavy timber beams. The open sky becomes occluded by the structure overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with benches and decorative flag bunting

events.description: exiting the covered dock structure back into open sunlight
emerging from shadow into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza area, passing benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in dark coat walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: empty wooden slatted benches for seating
string of colorful pennant flags hanging overhead
small octagonal wooden structure with a pointed roof
large metal framework structure for loading cargo

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright open plaza decorated with hanging pennant flags. Wooden benches line the dock, and an octagonal kiosk stands to the left. A large metal gantry structure rises in the distance. The character passes other pedestrians walking in the same direction as the warehouses shift from left to right in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: dockside promenade with port authority buildings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the port authority building, passing benches and dock workers

entered.detail: large wooden building with 'Port of Saint Denis' signage and arched windows
row of wooden commercial structures with awnings and signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the Port of Saint Denis building, a prominent wooden structure with visible signage. The character moves past wooden benches and through an area with decorative flags now overhead. Commercial buildings with awnings line the right side while the large metal gantry structure moves to the left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling industrial waterfront that transitions from a cluttered loading dock into a bright, open commercial plaza. It begins amidst sandbags and cargo crates, moving past a sweeping worker and telegraph poles before the character breaks into a jog toward a cluster of horse-drawn wagons. As the camera progresses, the scene opens up to reveal the waterfront railing and active dockhands, eventually shifting from the bright daylight into the deep shadows of a heavy timbered covered walkway. The character then emerges from the darkness into a sunlit plaza adorned with hanging pennant flags and an octagonal kiosk, with a large metal gantry rising in the distance. Finally, the movement leads past wooden benches and pedestrians toward the prominent Port of Saint Denis building, as the surrounding architecture shifts from industrial warehouses to commercial storefronts with awnings.
